name: Apple Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter, brown sugar, granulated sugar, eggs, sour cream, banana, and vanilla until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in the chopped apples and walnuts.
6. Pour the batter into a greased bread pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
